# Context Optimizer Skill (Minimal)

**Quick Reference** — Log parsing, turn-cost profiling, redundancy detection, hand-off gap analysis, instruction audit, report generation.

**Agent Audit** — ≤ 5 skills, ≤ 5 instructions, no duplicate reads, no identical skill sets, < 400 lines per agent definition.

**Context Growth** — Ranges from ~15K tokens (Step 1) to ~50K tokens (Step 5); session breaks at Gates 2 and 4.

**Optimization Patterns** — Subagent extraction, instruction narrowing, progressive skill loading, digest variants, artifact compression.

Read `SKILL.md` or `SKILL.digest.md` for full content.
